---
title: "CoastalFires_FigureCreation"
author: "rbb"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
#load necessary libraries
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)
library(extrafont)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
```

#set working directory
```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/barto/OneDrive/Documents/GitHub/CoastalFires")
```

#load dataset
```{r}
FigureData <- readr::read_csv("CoastalFires_FigureData.csv")
```
```{r}
#levo v burn extent
ggplot(FigureData, aes(x = Burn_Extent_percent, y = avg_levo_ppb, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  geom_jitter(width = 0.0001, color = "black", alpha = 1) +  # Add jittered points
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),    # Y-axis tick thickness
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),    # X-axis tick thickness
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),  # Set font to Calibri
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(x = "Burn Extent",
       y = "Levoglucosan (ppp)")
ggsave("A.png") 

#flux_levo v burn extent
ggplot(FigureData, aes(x = Burn_Extent_percent, y = flux_levo, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  geom_jitter(width = 0.0001, color = "black", alpha = 1) +  # Add jittered points
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),    # Y-axis tick thickness
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),    # X-axis tick thickness
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),  # Set font to Calibri
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(x = "Burn Extent",
       y = "Levoglucosan Flux")
ggsave("B.png") 
  
#yield_levo v burn extent
ggplot(FigureData, aes(x = Burn_Extent_percent, y = yield_levo, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  geom_jitter(width = 0.0001, color = "black", alpha = 1) +  # Add jittered points
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),    # Y-axis tick thickness
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),    # X-axis tick thickness
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),  # Set font to Calibri
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(x = "Burn Extent",
       y = "Levoglucosan Yield")
ggsave("C.png") 
  
#Levo:DOC v burn extent
ggplot(FigureData, aes(x = Burn_Extent_percent, y = Levo_DOC_perc, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  geom_jitter(width = 0.0001, color = "black", alpha = 1) +  # Add jittered points
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),    # Y-axis tick thickness
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),    # X-axis tick thickness
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),  # Set font to Calibri
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(title = "Levoglucosan Concentration by Burn Extent",
       x = "Burn Extent",
       y = "Levo:DOC (%)")
ggsave("D.png") 
  
```
##levo v low severity burn extent
```{r}
#levo v burn extent
ggplot(FigureData, aes(x = Area_low_severity_percent, y = avg_levo_ppb, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),    # Y-axis tick thickness
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),    # X-axis tick thickness
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),  # Set font to Calibri
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(x = "Low Severity Burn Extent",
       y = "Levoglucosan (ppb)")
ggsave("E.png") 

#flux_levo v burn extent
ggplot(FigureData, aes(x = Area_low_severity_percent, y = flux_levo, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),    # Y-axis tick thickness
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),    # X-axis tick thickness
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),  # Set font to Calibri
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(x = "Low Severity Burn Extent",
       y = "Levoglucosan Flux")
ggsave("F.png") 

#yield_levo v burn extent
ggplot(FigureData, aes(x = Area_low_severity_percent, y = yield_levo, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),    # Y-axis tick thickness
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),    # X-axis tick thickness
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),  # Set font to Calibri
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(x = "Low Severity Burn Extent",
       y = "Levoglucosan Yield")
ggsave("G.png") 

#Levo:DOC v burn extent
ggplot(FigureData, aes(x = Area_low_severity_percent, y = Levo_DOC_perc, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(size = 1),    # Y-axis tick thickness
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(size = 1),    # X-axis tick thickness
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),  # Set font to Calibri
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(title = "Levoglucosan Concentration by Burn Extent",
       x = "Low Severity Burn Extent",
       y = "Levo:DOC (%)")
ggsave("H.png") 
```

```{r}
# Reshape the data to long format, including both x variables
FigureData_long <- FigureData %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(avg_levo_ppb, flux_levo, yield_levo, Levo_DOC_perc), 
               names_to = "Measurement", 
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Burn_Extent_percent, Area_low_severity_percent, Area_low_to_mod_severity_percent, Area_mod_to_high_severity_percent), 
               names_to = "X_Variable", 
               values_to = "X_Value")

# Create a multi-panel box plot
ggplot(FigureData_long, aes(x = X_Value, y = Value, fill = watershed)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", size = 1.2, outlier.shape = NA) +  # Box plots
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, color = "black", alpha = 1) +  # Add jittered points
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E94411", "#FF7111", "#FFC44F", "#FFFFCC", "#9E0000")) +  # Customize colors
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),       # Remove major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),       # Remove minor gridlines
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.25, "cm"),     # Length of ticks
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),      # Thickness of tick marks
    axis.line = element_line(size = 1),        # Add axis lines
    legend.position = "none",                   # Remove the legend
    text = element_text(color = "black"),      # Set font color
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # X-axis text size
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),  # Y-axis text size
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title size
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)      # Y-axis title size
  ) +
  labs(title = "Levoglucosan and Levo:DOC Concentration by Burn Extent and Low Severity",
       x = "Extent (%)",
       y = "Concentration") +
  facet_grid(X_Variable ~ Measurement, scales = "free_y", switch = "y")  # Stac # Create panels 
```
